title: Biome Creepers - Nitpicks
description: Back in the alpha days, Creepers were vibrant like their surroundings. This makes them camouflage again, like the fun days!
body:
# Ugh, why are creepers always the same?!

### Optifine or [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) are required!
Back in Minecraft Alpha, Creepers used the leaves textures and the same foliage colors, making them camouflage with the environment, after Minecraft Alpha, they became too easy to spot. This Resource Pack aims to make Creepers interesting again with _**26 biome specific variations**_.

- Almost all textures uses textures before 1.14;
- Made like how Notch did it, using overlapping leave textures with ONLY foliage textures;
- The models have a second layer, making them look covered in leaves;
- [Fresh Animations compatibility here!](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/biome-creepers-fresh)
  
All of this makes them have a similar feel to the original Creeper yet a refresh and updated look to them without changing anything about the style of Minecraft.

![creepergif](https://i.imgur.com/ppLmgKy.gif)
<sub>Render made by SuperWillGaming</sub>

## Addons for this Resource Pack!

- [Fresh Animations compatibility](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/biome-creepers-fresh)
- [Biome Creepers O'Plenty by prisonertoaformula](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/biome-creepers-bop-edition)
